## Summary

What changed, and why?

## Verification

- [ ] `go test ./...`
- [ ] `go vet ./...`
- [ ] Integration test run if setup, migrations, or retrieval behavior changed
- [ ] Quickstart checked if docs or examples changed

## Public-change checklist

- [ ] Code updated
- [ ] Tests updated
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Example impact checked
- [ ] Release note impact checked

## Scope check

- [ ] This keeps `simplykb` within its low-entropy SDK scope
- [ ] This does not introduce a platform-style subsystem without prior design discussion

## Notes

Anything reviewers should pay special attention to.
